hero.name: Yann Clain
hero.title: Web & Mobile Web Developer | Application Designer
hero.description: Passionate about creation and innovation, I put my skills at the service of your projects. Currently looking for a company for an apprenticeship as an IT and Information Systems Expert.

about.title: Who am I?
about.description: Passionate about web and mobile development, I design innovative and high-performance digital solutions. My expertise covers full-stack development, from design to production.
about.bio: Currently training to become an IT and Information Systems Expert at La Fabrique Numérique in Pau (2024-2026), I'm looking for an apprenticeship where I can apply my skills as CTO / Project Manager.

services.title: My Services
services.description: I offer a complete range of services to bring your digital projects to life.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Creating modern, responsive and high-performance websites and web applications with the latest technologies.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Cross-platform mobile applications with React Native and Expo for iOS and Android.

backend.title: Backend & API
backend.description: Architecture and development of robust APIs with Node.js, NestJS, AdonisJS or Symfony.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Design of intuitive and aesthetic user interfaces with Figma.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: Discover a selection of my most recent work.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: To help me better understand your project, please provide as many details as possible. The more information I have, the better I can meet your needs.

errors.phone_min: Phone number must contain at least 10 characters
errors.phone_max: Phone number must contain at most 15 characters

footer.description: Passionate developer creating exceptional digital experiences.
